cases.description: Execution of a written plan triggers step-by-step execution with checkpoints
cases.prompt: execute the implementation plan we wrote
expectations: Reads the plan document before starting
Executes steps in sequence, one at a time
Reports completion of each step before proceeding
Stops and reports if a step fails rather than skipping it

cases.description: Following plan steps triggers sequential execution
cases.prompt: follow the steps in the plan file to implement the feature
expectations: Reads the plan file to understand all steps
Executes each step in the defined order
Verifies each step's completion before moving on

cases.description: Resuming an interrupted plan continues from the last incomplete step
cases.prompt: continue executing the plan from where we left off
expectations: Reads the plan to identify completed and pending steps

cases.description: Writing a plan should trigger plan-writer, not plan-executor
cases.prompt: write a plan for implementing the notification system
expectations: Does NOT invoke the plan-executor skill

cases.description: Parallel subagent execution should trigger subagent-dev, not plan-executor
cases.prompt: dispatch multiple agents to implement different parts of the system in parallel
expectations: Does NOT invoke the plan-executor skill
Routes to subagent-dev for parallel execution
